title: Wire GdxAudioDeviceDriver with Kira AudioManager
description: GdxAudioDeviceDriver currently has no AudioManager — all play/stop/volume methods are no-ops. Add kira::manager::AudioManager, HashMap<String, StaticSoundHandle> for per-path tracking. Implement play_path (StaticSoundData::from_file + manager.play), stop_path, set_volume_path, is_playing_path, dispose_path. File: beatoraja-audio/src/gdx_audio_device_driver.rs
notes:
File: beatoraja-audio/src/gdx_audio_device_driver.rs
Current struct has only: global_pitch: f32, song_resource_gen: i32 — no audio backend.
Add: manager: kira::manager::AudioManager<kira::manager::backend::DefaultBackend>,
     handles: HashMap<String, kira::sound::static_sound::StaticSoundHandle>,
     volume_map: HashMap<String, f64>
Key methods to implement:
- play_path(path, volume, loop): StaticSoundData::from_file(path) → manager.play() → store handle
- stop_path(path): handle.stop(Tween::default())
- set_volume_path(path, vol): handle.set_volume(vol, Tween::default())
- is_playing_path(path): handle.state() == PlaybackState::Playing
- dispose_path(path): stop + remove from handles map
Also check GdxSoundDriver in same crate for existing Kira patterns.
Java: GdxAudioDeviceDriver extends AudioDriver (LibGDX Audio)
close_reason: Closed

title: Fix MouseScratchInput::update to pass real mouse position
description: Both MouseScratchAlgorithmVersion1::update (line 344) and Version2::update (line 437) set curr_position = self.prev_position (always 0 diff). Fix: add curr_position parameter to update() trait method, caller passes MouseToAnalog::get_distance_moved() value. File: beatoraja-input/src/mouse_scratch_input.rs
notes:
File: beatoraja-input/src/mouse_scratch_input.rs
Stub lines: 344 (Version1) and 437 (Version2) — curr_position = self.prev_position (always 0 diff).
Fix: Change MouseScratchAlgorithm trait update() signature to accept curr_position: f64 parameter.
Caller (poll loop in MouseScratchInput::update) already has 'ref mut mta' (MouseToAnalog) available.
Pass mta.get_distance_moved(self.x_axis) as curr_position to alg.update(presstime, curr_position).
Both algorithms then use curr_position instead of self.prev_position for distance_diff calculation.
The scratch detection logic itself is correct — only the position input is stubbed.
Java: MouseScratchInput uses MouseToAnalog.getDistanceMoved()
close_reason: Closed

title: Implement LR2 score DB import
description: PlayConfigurationView::import_score_data_from_lr2() (line 1252) is stubbed. Need: (1) rfd crate for file chooser dialog, (2) rusqlite to open LR2 score.db, (3) ScoreDataImporter to map LR2 schema→ScoreData, (4) write via real ScoreDatabaseAccessor. Depends on Layer 1g. File: beatoraja-launcher/src/play_configuration_view.rs
notes:
File: beatoraja-launcher/src/play_configuration_view.rs line 1252
Step 1: Replace show_file_chooser stub with rfd::FileDialog::new().pick_file() (add rfd crate).
Step 2: Open LR2 score.db with rusqlite::Connection::open(path).
Step 3: LR2 score schema: table 'score' with columns: hash(TEXT), clear(INT), perfect(INT), great(INT), good(INT), bad(INT), poor(INT), combo(INT), minbp(INT), playcount(INT), clearcount(INT), date(INT).
Step 4: Map each row to beatoraja ScoreData struct.
Step 5: Write via ScoreDatabaseAccessor.set_score_data() (from beatoraja-song).
Note: LR2 uses MD5 hashes, beatoraja uses SHA256. Need hash conversion or lookup via SongDatabaseAccessor.
Java: ScoreDataImporter.importFromLR2()
close_reason: All implementations complete with tests passing

title: Wire SkinObjectRenderer draw pipeline
description: Connect SpriteBatch to wgpu command buffer for actual GPU rendering. SkinObjectRenderer needs to translate draw calls (drawImage, drawNumber, drawText) into SpriteBatch operations that produce wgpu render commands. Files: beatoraja-skin/src/skin_object_renderer.rs, beatoraja-render/src/sprite_batch.rs
notes:
Current state: SkinObjectRenderer in beatoraja-skin/src/skin_object_renderer.rs has draw methods but they're wired to SpriteBatch.
SpriteBatch in beatoraja-render/src/sprite_batch.rs collects draw commands.
Gap: SpriteBatch.flush() needs to emit wgpu render commands (vertex buffer upload, draw calls).
Implementation: (1) SpriteBatch accumulates quads (position, UV, color) (2) flush() uploads vertex data to wgpu buffer (3) issues wgpu draw call with texture bind group.
Key methods: draw_image(texture_region, x, y, w, h), draw_number(digits, x, y), draw_text(glyphs, x, y).
Java: SkinObjectRenderer extends SpriteBatch, calls GL draw
close_reason: Closed

Current struct (render/texture.rs): width, height, disposed, path, rgba_data. No GPU fields.
Add fields: gpu_texture: Option<wgpu::Texture>, gpu_view: Option<wgpu::TextureView>, sampler: Option<wgpu::Sampler>.
upload_to_gpu() at line ~60 already works — creates wgpu::Texture + write_texture. Refactor to store handles in struct.
draw_pixmap() at line 103: take &[u8] RGBA data + dimensions, create/update gpu_texture via queue.write_texture.
set_filter() at line 99: create wgpu::Sampler with specified FilterMode (Nearest/Linear).
TextureRegion is fully implemented (UV calc, flip, etc.).

notes: Implementation: Add pub fn validate(model: &mut BMSModel) to BMSPlayerRule enum in beatoraja-types/src/bms_player_rule.rs. Logic: (1) if judgerank < 0, set to 100 (2) if total <= 0, calculate default: 160.0 + (notes + min(max(notes-400,0),200)) * 0.16 (3) LR2 rule judge windows: [10, 30, 59, 119, 200] ms. beatoraja-types already depends on bms-model so BMSModel is available.
